title: GSC Token Recovery Report — Phase 16.11

refresh_attempts.root_cause: Google OAuth refresh_token has been EXPIRED or REVOKED. This is a permanent state — the refresh token is dead. No automated recovery possible.
refresh_attempts.why_not_recoverable: The refresh_token is the permanent credential used to obtain new access_tokens. When it expires (Google revokes refresh tokens after 6 months of non-use, or if user revokes app access), the OAuth grant is severed. No amount of retrying with client_id/secret will revive it — a new authorization code must be exchanged for a new refresh_token.

impact.gsc_search_analytics: BLOCKED — cannot pull impressions, clicks, CTR, position data
impact.first_click_detection: BLIND — cannot detect first click without live GSC data
impact.ctr_fix_monitoring: BLIND — cannot verify if CTR fixes are working
impact.data_quality: STALE — all GSC reports frozen at Jun 6 cached baseline (311 imp, 0 clicks)

qaesem_recovery_steps.note: Use the same Google account that owns the GSC property (qfinhub.com)

qaesem_recovery_steps.action: Click the gear icon (⚙️) → 'Use your own OAuth credentials'
qaesem_recovery_steps.note: Enter Client ID and Client Secret from ~/.hermes/google-indexing-token.json
Enter these scopes one per line in the input field, then click 'Authorize APIs'

qaesem_recovery_steps.action: Complete Google sign-in. Grant permissions. You'll be redirected back with an authorization code.
Step 2: Exchange authorization code for tokens
qaesem_recovery_steps.note: Click 'Exchange authorization code for tokens'. You'll get a new access_token AND refresh_token.

qaesem_recovery_steps.action: Copy the NEW refresh_token from the response
qaesem_recovery_steps.note: Look for '"refresh_token": "1//..."' in the response. This is the NEW permanent credential.
Replace the 'refresh_token' value with the new one. Keep everything else.

qaesem_recovery_steps.expected: Query and Page data pulled successfully

alternate_recovery: If OAuth Playground doesn't work, create new OAuth credentials at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials → Create OAuth client ID → Desktop app type → use in Playground.

while_blocked.gsc_data_status: STALE — Jun 6 cached baseline (311 imp, 0 clicks, avg pos 19.3)
while_blocked.first_click_detection: RELY ON QASEM MANUAL GSC UI CHECKS
while_blocked.reporting: ALL reports must show GSC_DATA_STATUS = STALE_OR_AUTH_BLOCKED
while_blocked.ctr_fixes: Continue applying to code, CANNOT verify impact until token fixed
while_blocked.page_2_push: Continue executing — internal links don't require GSC data
while_blocked.outreach: Continue sending — outreach doesn't require GSC data
while_blocked.linkable_assets: Continue building — code deployment doesn't require GSC data
